temporal_description: A close-up, static shot captures a tense conversation between two men in what appears to be an office. The man on the left, who is the focus of the shot, is middle-aged with short, dark hair. He is dressed in a white, short-sleeved uniform shirt with epaulets and a black tie. He looks intently at the other man, his expression serious and his mouth slightly open as if speaking. The man on the right is seen in profile, slightly out of focus. He is younger, with dark hair, and wears a light blue, short-sleeved shirt and a striped tie. He looks down and to his left, away from the first man, with a somber or contemplative demeanor. The background is a simple office interior, with a dark, framed picture hanging on the wall behind them. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The camera remains still, maintaining a tight focus on the interaction between the two individuals. A man speaks in a firm and commanding tone, giving a direct order. His voice is steady and serious as he instructs, "You and the CIB, work together, as soon as possible, find a way to break it open." The audio is clear, with no background music or other distracting sounds, emphasizing the direct and authoritative nature of the conversation.
